comment: Daman contract surface on Arc testnet. Addresses populated by `forge script script/DeployDaman.s.sol` after the Safe + Timelock land on-chain. Until the deploy runs, every address slot is the zero placeholder. The storefront, bridge, and agents read this file (via env or fetch) for proxy + Timelock wiring.

safe.comment: Patron king plus four operator-controlled signer keys (hardware wallets or HSM). Provisioned out-of-band via the Safe CLI or web app before the deploy script runs. Documented in docs/UPGRADE_AUTHORITY.md.

timelock.comment: TimelockController. Delay is 24h on testnet, 72h on mainnet. Admin + proposer + executor is the Safe address.

substrate.comment: Read from reverbprotocol/protocol/.deployments/arc-testnet.json. The Daman copy-bond constructor records this address; substrate is deployed first and its address is wired into the Daman deploy env.

humdRegistry.comment: Vanilla HumdRegistry from github.com/adiled/hum, deployed to Arc testnet as the immutable identity anchor for the Daman hum subnet. Single-tx deploy via `forge create lib/hum/contracts/src/HumdRegistry.sol:HumdRegistry`. No proxy, no Safe, no Timelock; the bytecode is the standard.
